sql.query: SELECT  DISTINCT op, dl_timestamp, TO_DATE(a.updatedt, 'yyyyMMdd') as updatedt, TO_DATE(a.updatedt, 'yyyyMMdd') as archivedt, dl_change_seq, appraisalreductionamt, assetcat_corp_debt_bal, fifthstatepropcnt, fifthstateproppct, fourthstate, fourthstatepropbal, fourthstatepropcnt, fourthstateproppct, hcbal, healthcarepropbal, healthcarepropcnt, healthcareproppct, hotelfullpropbal, hotelfullpropcnt, hotelfullproppct, hotelltdpropbal, hotelltdpropcnt, hotelltdproppct, hotelotherpropbal, hotelotherpropcnt, hotelotherproppct, inbal, industrialpropbal, industrialpropcnt, ofcount, officepropbal, officepropcnt, officeproppct, otbal, otherpropbal, otherpropcnt, otherproppct, partialiobal, partialioloanpct, performingspeciallyservicedloanpct, perfspclsrvcbal, perfspclsrvccount, possbal, posscount, prepaybal, prepaycnt, reobal, reocount, reoloanpct, retailanchoredpropbal, retailanchoredpropcnt, retailanchoredproppct, retailunanchoredpropbal, secondstate, secondstatebal, secondstatepropcnt, secondstateproppct, selfstoragepropbal, selfstoragepropcnt, selfstorageproppct, singletenantbal, specialservicerloanbal, specialservicerloancnt, specialservicerloanpct, ssbal, sumappred, thirddefeasedloanbal, thirddefeasedloanpct, thirddefeasedloanprop, thirddefeasedloanstatus, thirdproptype, thirdproptypebal, thirdstate, thirdstatebal, thirdstatepropcnt, top10bal, top10count, top10loanpct, top15bal, top15count, top15loanpct, top5bal, top5count, top5loanpct, topcountry, topcountrybal, topdefeasedloanbal, topdefeasedloanpct, topdefeasedloanprop, topdefeasedloanstatus, toploanbal, toploanpct, topproptype, topproptypebal, topproptypecount, topstate, topstatebal, topstatecount, topstatepropcnt, totalotheradv, totpenalty, ltvpercentgreaterthanequalto80, msanapercent, nonperfballdqpercent, perfsspercent, chpercent, hcpercent, inpercent, hotelpercent, pmfpercent, mhpercent, mupercent, ofpercent, otpercent, rtpercent, sspercent, unpercent, whpercent, reodqpercent, singletenantpercent, top10loanpercent, top15loanpercent, top5loanpercent, toppropertytype, toppropertytypepercent, topstatepercent, dqpercent, undqpercent, watchlistpercent, propertytype2nd, state2nd, propertytype3rd, state3rd, cumulativeappraisalreductionamount, cumulativeaseramount, currentcollateralbalance, currentloancount, currentwac, mostrecentaser, partialioloanpercent, specialservicingpercent, percent2ndpropertytype, percent2ndstate, percent3rdpropertytype, percent3rdstate, ioonlypercent, mfdirecteddefeasedpercent, mfdirecteddqpercent, mfdirectedperfsspercent, partialiobalpercent, top10loanbalpercent, top15loanbalpercent, top5loanbalpercent, msapercentbal1to25, msapercentbal26to50, msapercentbal51plus, msanabalpercent, performingbalspecialservicepercent, sfpercent, concat(a.dealid,'-',a.curdistribdt) as mktprimaryid  FROM mktrptfinal a WHERE a.mktrownumber=1
